description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish sling bag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsDark green faux leather and velvet bagDouble decker styleDrawstring and zipper closure on upper compartment and zippered lower compartmentSynthetic lining with zippered pocketOne zippered pocket and branding at backOne long and adjustable shoulder strapMaterial and CareFabric, syntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 24 cmWidth: 26 cmDepth: 12 cm
